title: Moroccan Lamb Tagine
description: A classic Moroccan stew made with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and dried fruits. This dish is perfect for special occasions and can be served with couscous or bread.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is softened.
Add the carrots, prunes, chicken broth, spice blend, salt, and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2.5 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Serve hot over couscous or with crusty bread.
